title: Sh1ro
extract: Dmitry Sokolov, better known as sh1ro, is a professional Counter-Strike 2 player currently playing for Team Spirit. Sokolov played in 6 Counter-Strike Majors, winning the 2024 Perfect World Shanghai Major against FaZe 2-1.
extract_html: Dmitry Sokolov, better known as sh1ro, is a professional Counter-Strike 2 player currently playing for Team Spirit. Sokolov played in 6 Counter-Strike Majors, winning the 2024 Perfect World Shanghai Major against FaZe 2-1.
